title: orchis × gelmiana
intro: Orchis × gelmiana is a hybrid orchid plant, derived from the cross between the green-winged orchid (Orchis morio) and the soldier orchid (Orchis militaris). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orchis × gelmiana are attributed to its ability to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory issues, fever, and skin infections, due to its expectorant and antipyretic properties. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or powder, which are used to treat various health issues, and are often used in combination with other herbal remedies.
